# MediMatch

> AI-powered healthcare navigation: symptom analysis, specialist matching, and access to government health schemes across India.

MediMatch helps patients describe symptoms in plain language (or voice), get an AI-driven preliminary assessment, and find the right doctor, hospital, or government scheme nearby. Multilingual (English, Hindi, Bengali, Marathi, Punjabi, and more) with video consultations and in-app appointment management.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of MediMatch and how AI-driven healthcare navigation works.
- [Symptom Analysis](/symptoms): Describe symptoms via text, voice, or body map for AI assessment.
- [Results](/results): Personalized specialist recommendations and urgency guidance.
- [Find Doctors](/doctors): Searchable directory of verified specialists with map and list views.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Health dashboard with personal analytics.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for patients and doctors.
